title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq trade mixed as Wall Street weighs Google, Tesla earnings Hopes for a US-EU trade deal kept fresh records in sight as Wall Street assessed earnings from Alphabet and Tesla.

Stock market today: S&P 500, Nasdaq hit records, Dow closes in as trade hopes lift stocks before Tesla, Google Wall Street is getting ready for Tesla and Google-parent Alphabet to fire up "Magnificent 7" earnings.
Trending tickers: Tesla, Alphabet, Chipotle, BT and ITV The latest investor updates on stocks that are trending on Thursday.
Oil prices rise as trade deals take centre stage Renewed optimism surrounding trade negotiations and a sharper-than-expected decline in American crude inventories eased investor concerns.

LIVE: UK-India trade deal boosts FTSE while Wall Street opens mixed after tech earnings UK prime minister Keir Starmer hailed the deal as 'the biggest and most economically significant' agreement Britain has made since Brexit.
